# QD Frames — Premium European Windows, Doors & Facades

> QD Frames is a European manufacturer and supplier of premium PVC and aluminium windows, doors, glass facades, roller shutters, and garage doors. We are certified partners of REHAU, Schüco, and FEAL. We deliver custom-made products to 28+ European countries at 30-40% lower prices than local suppliers.

## Company Information
- Website: https://qdframes.nl
- Email: info@qdframes.com
- Phone: +31 6 40837919
- WhatsApp: +31 6 40837919
- Location: Netherlands (serving all of Europe)

## Products

### PVC/uPVC Windows
REHAU certified PVC window systems including tilt & turn, sliding, fixed, and specialty shapes. Available in REHAU EURO Design 70, SYNEGO, and GENEO profiles. Triple glazing available. Energy ratings up to A++. Uw values as low as 0.7 W/m²K.

### Aluminium Windows & Doors
Schüco and FEAL aluminium systems for residential and commercial projects. Slim sightlines, large glass surfaces, excellent thermal performance. Available in any RAL color.

### Entrance Doors
Premium PVC and aluminium entrance doors with multi-point locking, thermal insulation, and custom designs. Fingerprint and smart lock options available.

### Sliding & Bifold Doors
Lift & slide, tilt & slide, and bifold door systems in PVC and aluminium. Openings up to 6.5 meters wide.

### Glass Facades & Curtain Walls
Schüco FWS curtain wall systems and structural glazing for commercial buildings, offices, and modern residential projects.

### Roller Shutters & Blinds
External roller shutters, integrated shutter systems, and motorized blinds. Manual and electric operation.

### Garage Doors
Sectional, roller, and side-sliding garage doors with insulation. Manual and motorized options.

## Key Differentiators
1. **30-40% lower prices** than local European window suppliers
2. **Certified European brands**: REHAU, Schüco, FEAL
3. **28+ countries** delivery across Europe
4. **Custom-made** to exact measurements
5. **4-6 week** production and delivery
6. **Free quotes** within 24 hours
7. **Multi-language support**: English, Dutch, German, French, Spanish, Italian, Polish

## Brands We Carry
- **REHAU**: Leading German PVC/uPVC profile manufacturer. Known for energy efficiency, durability, and innovation.
- **Schüco**: Premium German aluminium systems for windows, doors, and facades. Industry leader in commercial and high-end residential.
- **FEAL**: European aluminium profile manufacturer. Excellent quality-to-price ratio for residential and light commercial.

## How to Order
1. Visit https://qdframes.nl/configurator to configure your windows
2. Or contact us for a free quote: info@qdframes.com / +31 6 40837919
3. We provide detailed quotation within 24 hours
4. Production: 4-6 weeks
5. Delivery to your door anywhere in Europe

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: How much cheaper are your windows compared to buying locally?
A: Our windows are 30-40% cheaper than local European suppliers because we manufacture in certified European facilities and deliver directly, eliminating middlemen markups.

Q: Do you install windows?
A: We specialize in manufacturing and delivery. We can recommend trusted local installation partners in most European countries.

Q: What warranty do you offer?
A: All products come with manufacturer warranty. REHAU profiles carry a 10-year warranty. Glass units carry a 5-year warranty.

Q: Can I visit your showroom?
A: Contact us to arrange a visit or request physical samples sent to your address.

Q: Do you handle customs for UK deliveries?
A: Yes, we handle all logistics including customs documentation for non-EU deliveries to the UK, Switzerland, and Norway.
